notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided that nothing in this subchapter would affect any claims filed against the United States by the Ponca Tribe before , was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 87–629, § 676 Stat. 430Sept. 5, 1962Sept. 5, 1962
